candidates.why: Explicitly labeled total revenue on income statement with large positive values; best representation of top-line sales.

candidates.row_label: Accrued revenues at the point in time
candidates.why: Balance sheet accrued revenue; not the main revenue flow, only a working-capital component.
Explicitly labeled non-revenue; should not be used as top-line.
Primary production-related cost with large magnitudes, matching typical COGS/cost of sales.
Could be part of direct production costs but appears small/occasional; secondary to main materials line.
Another materials-related line but much smaller and sporadic; likely a component or reclassification item, not the main COGS aggregate.
Inventory asset, not a period expense; not appropriate for COGS.
Represents income, not expense; should generally be excluded from SG&A expense components.

candidates.row_label: Stock-Based Compensation in Selling, General & Administrative Expenses
candidates.why: Explicit SG&A component (stock-based comp in SG&A); clearly qualifies as overhead expense component.
Generic operating expense bucket likely including SG&A-type overhead when no explicit SG&A total is provided.
Explicit overhead-type operating expenses; fits SG&A components and is not a total/subtotal line.

candidates.row_label: Amortization of Brands, Patents, Trademarks, Marketing & Artistic Intangibles - Supplemental
candidates.why: Amortization/D&A, which instructions say to exclude from SG&A components even if related to marketing intangibles.

final_choice.row_label: Stock-Based Compensation in Selling, General & Administrative Expenses

variables.notes: Selected only expense/overhead lines, excluding income and amortization per instructions. Multiple rows are used as SG&A components.

candidates.row_label: Amortization excluding Goodwill in Research & Development Expenses
candidates.why: Income-statement amortization specifically tied to R&D; closest available recurring R&D-related expense line.

candidates.row_label: Amortization of Capitalized Research & Development Expenses - Supplemental
candidates.why: Supplemental detail of amortization of capitalized R&D; overlaps conceptually with the main R&D amortization line.
Balance sheet asset, not period expense; may include more than R&D.
Gross capitalized R&D asset on balance sheet, not the current period expense.

candidates.row_label: Research & Development Costs - Accumulated Amortization & Impairment
candidates.why: Contra-asset for capitalized R&D on balance sheet; not an income-statement expense line for the period.

final_choice.row_label: Amortization excluding Goodwill in Research & Development Expenses

variables.notes: No explicit R&D expense line; using the specific R&D amortization expense as the best available proxy.

candidates.why: Primary interest expense line on income statement; best measure of financing cost.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities
candidates.why: Component of interest expense related to lease liabilities; good fallback if main interest expense line missing.

candidates.row_label: Net interest cost of pension obligations
candidates.why: Interest component of pension costs; secondary form of interest expense if others unavailable.
Represents allocation of net income, not an interest expense.
Same as non-controlling interests; equity attribution, not interest cost.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supplemental
candidates.why: Supplemental detail for lease interest; appropriate as an additional fallback after primary interest lines.
Likely derivative position; not an income-statement interest expense line.
Debt balance, not an expense.
Debt balance, not an expense.
Equity attributable to NCI; not interest expense.
Same as non-controlling interests; equity, not expense.

final_choice.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities
Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supplemental
Net interest cost of pension obligations

variables.notes: Ordered as a priority list: core interest expense first, then lease-related and supplemental, then pension interest as last resort.

candidates.why: Represents net income attributable to equity holders, not the equity balance itself.
Comprehensive income attribution, not a balance sheet equity total.
Unclear equity-affiliate metric, not total shareholders’ equity.
Explicit total equity line on balance sheet; best representation of book equity.
Balancing item, not the main equity total; avoid when explicit total equity exists.
Balancing item used for reconciliation, not the reported equity figure.
Balancing artifact; not the primary line for equity.

candidates.row_label: Balancing Item - Total Liability and Equity
candidates.why: Balancing artifact for the accounting identity; not pure equity.
Represents total assets = liabilities + equity; not isolated equity.
Income statement allocation of profit to NCI, not the equity balance, but correctly labeled as minority interest conceptually.
Duplicate naming of NCI in income statement context; again profit allocation, not the balance sheet amount.
Balance sheet line for NCI (minority interest in equity); best representation of minority interest (MIB).
Appears to be duplicate of Non-controlling Interests with same values; also valid as MIB line.

variables.notes: Using balance sheet NCI as primary measure of minority interest, with the duplicate label as fallback.
